====Pokémon====
This listing is of Roxie's known {{OBP|Pokémon|species}} in {{aniseries|PTS}}:
{{TrainerPoké
| trainer = Roxie
| pkmn = Koffing
| type1 = Poison
| epnum = BW083
| epname = Rocking the Virbank Gym! Part 1
| img = Roxie Koffing.png
| vajp = Kensuke Satō
| vaen = Bill Rogers
| desc = {{p|Koffing}} was Roxie's lead Pokémon in her Gym battle against Ash. She caught it while she was touring in [[Kanto]], and it became the inspiration for her rock band, "Koffing and the Toxics." Upon Ash, Cilan, and Iris's arrival at the Gym, Koffing was already showcasing its power, effortlessly defeating a Trainer's Gothitelle despite the type disadvantage. During Ash's battle, Koffing proved to be quite strong and tough to handle, easily taking down his {{AP|Boldore}} and {{AP|Unfezant}}. However, its impressive streak ended when {{AP|Leavanny}}, using String Shot to tie Koffing up and then landing an Energy Ball, finally defeating it.

Koffing's known moves are {{m|Clear Smog}}, {{m|Gyro Ball}}, {{m|Sludge Bomb}}, and {{m|Will-O-Wisp}}.
}}

{{TrainerPoké
| trainer = Roxie
| pkmn = Scolipede
| type1 = Bug
| type2 = Poison
| epnum = BW083
| epname = Rocking the Virbank Gym! Part 1
| img = Roxie Scolipede.png
| vajp = Unshō Ishizuka
| vaen = Marc Thompson
| desc = {{p|Scolipede}} was the second Pokémon Roxie used against Ash in their Gym battle. It quickly defeated Ash's Leavanny, but was later taken down by {{AP|Pignite}}'s powerful {{m|Fire Pledge}}, who had the type advantage.

Scolipede's known moves are {{m|Toxic}}, {{m|Rock Tomb}}, {{m|Sludge Bomb}}, and {{m|Screech}}.
}}

{{TrainerPoké
|trainer=Roxie
|pkmn=Garbodor
|type1=Poison
|epnum=BW084
|epname=Rocking the Virbank Gym! Part 2
|img=Roxie Garbodor.png
|vajp=Chiaki Takahashi
|vaen= Erica Schroeder
|desc={{p|Garbodor}} was the third and last Pokémon Roxie used against Ash in their Gym battle. It defeated Ash's Pignite and {{AP|Palpitoad}}, but was later defeated by {{AP|Pikachu}} after getting {{status|paralysis|paralyzed}} by his {{a|Static}}. It reappeared in a flashback in ''[[BW103|Certain Up, Unova League!]]''.

Garbodor's known moves are {{m|Double Slap}}, {{m|Hyper Beam}}, {{m|Gunk Shot}}, and {{m|Venoshock}}.}}
